title: Nitration of Phthalide
author: R. D'COSTA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Nadkarny-Sacasa Research Laboratory, Chemistry Department, St. Xavier's College, Bombay-400001 

  Manuscript received 17 September 1974; accepted 13 January 1975  

 Nitration studies on phthalide have resulted in the isolation of 3-nitrophthalide, a compound hitherto unlisted in the literature.
